name_en: M81520! Sakura Pink! Made of top-grain cowhide! Women's coin purse card holder, small yet practical. This colorful envelope-style coin purse is the perfect companion for modern women in city life. Compact, easily fits into bags or even pockets. Size: 11×8cm.
